All Classes

Class Description
AppleFruit
"Normal" Fruit, is red, doesn't do anything but can be eaten
Balken
The black status bar at the bottom of the interface, "fills up" when you eat a special fruit (magenta for Bananas and cyan for Blueberries)
BananaFruit
Special Fruit, is yellow, makes snake faster if Bar is full, mainly yellow fruits were eaten and mouse Button is pressed
Bar  
BlueBerryFruit
Special Fruit, is blue, makes the snake slower if Bar is full, mainly blue fruits were eaten and mouse Button is pressed
Color
Class representing Colors.
Game
Base class for all games.
GameOver
The Game Over Screen, appears when you hit a wall
GraphicElement
The class representing Generic Graphic Elements (i.e.
HardwareMatrixCommunicator  
Lumenaer
The lumenaer framework class for setting up games and displaying them either on a real 24x24 pixel matrix or in a window for development pruposes.
LumenaerConstants  
LumenaerStarter
Starter class for the lumenaer programm.
MiniAstroidsGame  
MiniSnakeGame
The Main Game Class
Movable  
PixelMatrix
Class representing the pixelArray matrix.
PixelMatrixPanel  
Projectile  
RectangleGraphicElement
Rectangle Graphics Object
Snake
Snake Class, defines properties and movement of the snake
SpaceShip  
SpriteGraphicElement
Abstract base class for all sprite based GraphicElements.
SquareGraphicElement
